document:
# SENIOR SECURED TERM LOAN AGREEMENT

**Dated:** 15 February 2024

---

## PARTIES

**Borrower:** Meridian Industrial Holdings Ltd.
**Lender:** Apex Credit Opportunities Fund III, L.P.
**Agent:** Apex Capital Management LLC
**Tokenisation Agent:** Covenant Sentinel Protocol

---

## ARTICLE I — LOAN TERMS

### 1.1 Principal Amount

The Lender agrees to advance to the Borrower a term loan in an aggregate principal amount of **USD 50,000,000** (fifty million United States Dollars) (the "Loan").

### 1.4 Reporting Frequency

Covenant testing shall occur every **90 days**.

---

## ARTICLE III — FINANCIAL COVENANTS

### 3.1 Maximum Total Net Leverage Ratio

The **Total Net Leverage Ratio** shall not exceed **4.50x** at any testing date.

*"Total Net Leverage Ratio"* means the ratio of (a) Total Financial Indebtedness minus Unrestricted Cash to (b) Adjusted EBITDA, trailing twelve months.

*EBITDA Adjustments:* Exclude (i) non-recurring restructuring charges up to USD 3,000,000 per annum, (ii) non-cash stock-based compensation, (iii) gains/losses from asset disposals, (iv) transaction fees.

### 3.2 Minimum Interest Coverage Ratio

The **Interest Coverage Ratio** shall not be less than **2.50x** at any testing date.

*"Interest Coverage Ratio"* means Adjusted EBITDA / Total Cash Interest Expense, trailing twelve months.

*EBITDA Adjustments:* Same as Section 3.1.

### 3.3 Minimum Debt Service Coverage Ratio

The **Debt Service Coverage Ratio** shall not be less than **1.20x** at any testing date.

*"Debt Service Coverage Ratio"* means (Adjusted EBITDA minus Unfunded CapEx) / Total Debt Service, trailing twelve months.

*EBITDA Adjustments:* Same as Section 3.1. Budgeted maintenance CapEx may be excluded where supported by board-approved budgets.

### 3.4 Maximum Capital Expenditure

Maximum permitted Capital Expenditure ratio is **0.12x** of trailing twelve-month Adjusted Revenue.

*"Capital Expenditure"*: Excludes (i) expenditure financed by permitted acquisition debt, (ii) insurance proceeds reinvested within 180 days.

### 3.5 Minimum Liquidity

Minimum Unrestricted Cash ratio of not less than **0.10x** of Total Financial Indebtedness.

*Adjustments:* Undrawn revolving credit availability (remaining term ≥ 12 months) may be included.
